unibay-phantom-17.longDescription: The Phantom 17 is built for UK gamers who want desktop-class frame rates in a mobile chassis. Vapour-chamber graphics cooling, MUX-capable GPU routing, and a high-bit-depth Mini-LED panel make it equally suited to HDR content review and competitive shooters. Every unit is stress-tested in our integration lab before dispatch.

rows.label: CPU
rows.value: Intel Core i9-14900HX, 24C/32T, vPro-ready silicon where configured

rows.label: GPU
rows.value: NVIDIA GeForce RTX 4090 Laptop GPU, up to 175W TGP with Dynamic Boost

rows.label: Cooling
rows.value: Vapour chamber + dual blowers, liquid metal optional on select builds

rows.label: Audio
rows.value: ESS-class DAC headphone amp, dual 2W + dual 2W woofers

rows.label: Battery & adapter
rows.value: 99.9Wh class battery, 330W GaN slim adapter, UK 3-pin plug

rows.label: Security
rows.value: TPM 2.0, Windows Hello IR camera, Kensington Nano slot

whatsInTheBox: 330W GaN UK power adapter + figure-8 lead
unibay-phantom-17.warrantySummary: 12-month (1 year) UK warranty covering parts and labour for manufacturing defects. Accidental damage cover available as an upgrade.
unibay-phantom-17.complianceNotes: CE & UKCA marked for Great Britain. WEEE producer registration: dispose of electronics via local civic amenity sites. Energy label supplied at point of sale where required.

unibay-phantom-15.longDescription: Phantom 15 trims size without trimming thermal headroom. The OLED panel delivers inky blacks for cinematic HDR while the HX-class CPU and RTX 4080 keep high refresh esports fluid. Ideal for students and creators who commute between accommodation and LAN events.

rows.label: Brightness
rows.value: 500 nits typical SDR, VESA DisplayHDR True Black 500

rows.label: Graphics
rows.value: NVIDIA RTX 4080 Laptop GPU, MUX switch supported

unibay-phantom-15.warrantySummary: 12-month (1 year) UK warranty as standard; optional on-site next-business-day for business SKUs.
unibay-phantom-15.complianceNotes: UKCA / CE. Ships with UK mains plug.

unibay-spectre-16.longDescription: Spectre 16 targets colour-critical workflows: 4K OLED at 120Hz, wide gamut coverage, and CUDA acceleration for DaVinci Resolve and Blender. Dual Thunderbolt 5 ports feed high-bandwidth NVMe RAIDs and reference monitors without dongle clutter.

rows.label: GPU
rows.value: NVIDIA RTX 4090 Laptop, Studio Driver validated stack

rows.label: Storage
rows.value: 2TB PCIe Gen5 NVMe (secondary M.2 free on base tray)

rows.label: Thunderbolt
rows.value: TB5 ×2, 120Gbps aggregate where host routing allows

rows.label: ISV
rows.value: Test matrices for Adobe CC, Autodesk, Foundry

unibay-spectre-16.warrantySummary: 12-month (1 year) warranty including premium panel pixel policy (terms apply).
unibay-spectre-16.complianceNotes: UKCA marked; ships with UK plug.

unibay-stealth-14.longDescription: Stealth 14 is the ultraportable line for hybrid workers: CNC aluminium shell, 1.6 kg travel weight class, and Ryzen AI NPU-assisted workloads for Teams background effects and light ONNX models. Performance mode lifts power limits when plugged into 100W USB-C PD.

rows.label: Battery
rows.value: 72Wh, Rapid Charge to 50% in 30 min (65W adapter)

unibay-stealth-14.warrantySummary: 12-month (1 year) carry-in warranty; optional accidental damage available.
unibay-stealth-14.complianceNotes: UKCA / CE; ErP Lot 26 compliant idle states.

unibay-titan-pro.longDescription: Titan Pro is our halo desktop: hardline custom loop, dual D5 pumps in redundancy layout, and thermally sorted cable management for unobstructed airflow. Each build receives a documented leak test, overnight soak, and OCCT power virus before packing in a reusable flight case option.

rows.label: Case
rows.value: UNIBAY Titan full tower, 4× tempered glass panels

rows.label: Fans
rows.value: 10× 120mm PWM, curve tuned for dBA targets

rows.label: CPU
rows.value: Intel Core i9-14900KS, tuned PL1/PL2 per chassis

rows.label: GPU
rows.value: NVIDIA RTX 4090 24GB FE or AIB partner card (SKU dependent)

rows.label: Storage
rows.value: 2TB Gen5 NVMe + 4TB SATA archive (hot-swap bay optional)

rows.label: Acoustics
rows.value: Idle <22 dBA @1m typical in balanced fan curve

unibay-titan-pro.warrantySummary: 12-month (1 year) on-site (UK mainland) warranty for liquid loop components; extended fluid service packs available.
unibay-titan-pro.complianceNotes: Low Voltage Directive; WEEE registration on file; RoHS compliant BOM.

unibay-vortex.longDescription: Vortex balances price-to-performance for 1440p ultra and 4K high settings gaming. Mesh-front intake, positive pressure dust filtration, and a 280mm AIO on the CPU keep boost clocks sustained during long sessions.

rows.label: Case airflow
rows.value: High-airflow mesh, dust filters serviceable from front

unibay-vortex.warrantySummary: 12-month (1 year) return-to-base warranty; GPU/CPU carry manufacturer warranty in parallel.
unibay-vortex.complianceNotes: UKCA; ERP Lot 3 2019 compliant external power where applicable.

unibay-creator-station.longDescription: Creator Station pairs Threadripper throughput with ECC memory for editorial, CAD, and simulation pipelines. Dual NVMe RAID options and optional 10GbE accelerate NAS timelines for distributed UK studios.

rows.label: Storage
rows.value: 4TB NVMe RAID0 + 8TB cold tier NAS bundle option

rows.label: PCIe
rows.value: Gen5 x16 primary, Gen4 x8 secondary

rows.label: Audio
rows.value: ASUS/Realtek reference codec, EMI shielded traces

unibay-creator-station.warrantySummary: 12-month (1 year) on-site warranty with priority parts for registered business customers.
unibay-creator-station.complianceNotes: UKCA; supports Windows 11 Pro for Workstations imaging.

unibay-compact-fury.longDescription: Compact Fury fits full-width GPUs in a sub-15 litre ITX volume. PCIe 4.0 riser, custom PSU cables, and tuned fan curves keep noise acceptable on a desk beside a monitor arm.
unibay-compact-fury.warrantySummary: 12-month (1 year) RTB warranty; SFF thermal service pack recommended annually.
unibay-compact-fury.complianceNotes: UKCA; VESA mount pattern optional accessory.

unibay-monitor-32.longDescription: Vision 32 pairs a fast IPS panel with local dimming zones for HDR gaming and grading on a single display. HDMI 2.1 bandwidth supports modern consoles at 4K120 with VRR, while KVM features simplify dual-PC setups common in streaming rigs.

rows.label: Adaptive sync
rows.value: AMD FreeSync Premium Pro, G-SYNC compatible

unibay-monitor-32.warrantySummary: 12-month (1 year) advanced replacement for panel defects (policy applies).
unibay-monitor-32.complianceNotes: Energy label class B typical; UK plug factory fitted.

unibay-keyboard-pro.longDescription: Tactile Pro uses pre-lubed linear switches with polycarbonate top housings for a smooth, quiet office profile, while retaining rapid actuation for gaming. Dual-mode 2.4GHz / Bluetooth 5.1 with AES pairing and per-key RGB sync via UNIBAY Signal app.
unibay-keyboard-pro.warrantySummary: 12-month (1 year) warranty; switch sockets covered for manufacturing defects only.

unibay-mouse-apex.longDescription: Apex is an esports-first shape under 60 g with optical main switches rated for 80M clicks. The sensor tracks reliably on cloth and hybrid pads; onboard profiles store DPI steps for tournament PCs without cloud login.
unibay-mouse-apex.warrantySummary: 12-month (1 year) RTB warranty; battery capacity warranty 12 months.

unibay-phantom-17-pro.longDescription: The Phantom 17 Pro represents the absolute pinnacle of laptop engineering. Every component is hand-selected by our UK configuration team and assembled in our integration centre with torque-calibrated tools. The vapour-chamber cooling spans the full chassis width, dissipating heat from both CPU and GPU simultaneously — achieving sustained clocks that lesser laptops only reach in brief bursts. Our MUX switch bypasses the iGPU entirely, delivering 10-15% more performance directly to the display. The 240Hz Mini-LED panel uses 1152 local dimming zones for true HDR contrast alongside peak brightness gaming monitors struggle to match.

rows.label: Technologies
rows.value: DLSS 3.5, Frame Generation, Ray Tracing Gen 3, NVENC AV1

unibay-phantom-17-pro.warrantySummary: 1-year collect-and-return warranty. Year 1: on-site labour included (UK mainland). Battery covered for minimum 80% capacity at 12 months.
unibay-phantom-17-pro.complianceNotes: CE / UKCA marked. RoHS compliant. WEEE registered. Packaging 100% recyclable.
